backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types and state for a barcode label printing system, including print job history, label settings, user profiles, and serial number tracking, with authorization checks via AccessControl mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping the app with PasswordSessionProvider and ErrorBoundary, showing LockScreen or AppShell based on session state and auto-reconnecting the printer on unlock.
frontend/src/audio/soundSystem.ts: Zustand-persisted sound settings store with Web Audio API beep generation, custom audio file support, and a `playSound` function dispatching success, error, and printComplete sounds.
frontend/src/auth/passwordSession.ts: Utility functions for creating, retrieving, validating, and clearing an 8-hour password session stored in localStorage, checked against a configured expected password.
frontend/src/auth/PasswordSessionProvide: React context provider managing password session state, validating passwords on unlock, rehydrating sessions from localStorage, and exposing lock/unlock actions.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: Main application shell rendering a header with branding and controls, and a four-tab layout (Scan & Print, Label Settings, Devices, Diagnostics) with lock functionality.
frontend/src/components/BackendAvailabil: Small badge component that renders a destructive 'Backend Unavailable' indicator only when the backend availability store reports the backend is down.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class component that catches runtime errors in its subtree and displays a fallback UI with a refresh button, or a custom fallback if provided.
frontend/src/components/HeaderDeviceCont: Header component displaying printer connection status as a badge and an optional wake lock toggle switch using the printer store and wake lock hook.
frontend/src/components/SerialTypeCounte: Displays a grid of print count cards per configured prefix mapping, pulling counter data from the diagnostics store and label settings store.
frontend/src/components/SoundEffectsSett: Settings UI for configuring sound effects (success, error, print complete) with per-event sound selection, volume control, file upload for custom sounds, and test playback.
frontend/src/config/lockScreenConfig.ts: Exports a function that returns the lock screen password, defaulting to 'swh1400' but overridable via the VITE_LOCK_PASSWORD build-time environment variable.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisted identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for submitting print jobs, fetching print history, and incrementing print counts against the ICP backend actor, with canister error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useWakeLock.ts: Custom hook that manages the Screen Wake Lock API, persisting the user's preference to localStorage and re-requesting the lock on page visibility changes.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for a dark warehouse theme with blue accents, plus base styles for touch targets and focus states.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/printing/barcodePreview.ts: Generates a deterministic SVG barcode pattern from a serial string and returns it as a data URL, simulating Code 128 encoding with configurable bar width.
frontend/src/printing/cpclBarcodeDiagnos: Provides validation and diagnostic logging utilities for barcode data, position, and height, emitting structured log entries via the log store.
frontend/src/printing/cpclBarcodeMapping: Maps UI barcode type strings to CPCL printer tokens and recommended parameters, with a Code 128 fallback for unsupported types.
frontend/src/printing/cpclGenerator.ts: Generates CPCL command strings for label print jobs by converting label settings and serial data to printer dot coordinates, applying barcode validation and layout adjustments.
frontend/src/printing/cpclLayoutAdjustme: Provides utilities to clamp barcode X positions within safe label margins and estimate barcode width in dots based on data length and CPCL parameters.
frontend/src/printing/LabelPreview.tsx: React component that renders a visual preview of a label with two barcodes and a title, computing pixel positions from label settings using mm-to-px conversions.
frontend/src/printing/previewUnits.ts: Defines unit conversion constants and functions for converting between millimeters, printer dots (203 DPI), and CSS pixels for consistent preview and CPCL rendering.
frontend/src/screens/LockScreen.tsx: Renders a password entry screen that gates access to the app, calling the `unlock` function from `PasswordSessionProvider` and showing error feedback on failure.
frontend/src/screens/PasswordSessionWiri: Displays a static error screen when the password session system is misconfigured, with suggestions and a page-reload button.
frontend/src/services/printerService.ts: Zustand store managing USB printer state (connect, disconnect, auto-reconnect, print CPCL, test print) by delegating to the USB transport layer and logging all actions.
frontend/src/services/usbCpclTransport.t: Low-level WebUSB transport layer that handles requesting, opening, reconnecting to, and sending raw data to USB CPCL printers, with localStorage persistence of the last connected printer identifier.
frontend/src/state/backendAvailabilitySt: Zustand store tracking whether the backend is reachable, with actions to mark it available, stopped (with error message), or reset.
frontend/src/state/diagnosticsStore.ts: Persisted Zustand store tracking cumulative scan, print, and error counts both globally and broken down by label type prefix.
frontend/src/state/labelSettingsStore.ts: Persisted Zustand store holding label layout and barcode settings with versioned migration support and a synchronous getter for use outside React.
frontend/src/state/logStore.ts: Persisted Zustand store that maintains a capped ring-buffer of up to 1000 timestamped log entries with level and optional metadata.
frontend/src/state/printHistoryStore.ts: Persisted Zustand store recording the last 1000 print jobs, with a `reprint` helper that resends a historical job's CPCL to the printer.
frontend/src/state/useLabelSettingsHydra: React hook that returns a boolean indicating whether the label settings Zustand store has finished rehydrating from localStorage.
frontend/src/tabs/DevicesTab.tsx: React tab component for managing USB CPCL printer connections, displaying connection status, and triggering test prints via the printer store.
frontend/src/tabs/DiagnosticsTab.tsx: React tab component showing print statistics, per-prefix counters, print history with reprint capability, and filterable application logs.
frontend/src/tabs/LabelSettingsTab.tsx: React tab component for configuring label and barcode settings, managing prefix mappings, previewing labels, and importing/exporting settings as JSON.
frontend/src/tabs/ScanPrintTab.tsx: React tab component implementing a multi-step scan-and-print workflow that validates serial prefixes, checks for duplicates, generates CPCL, and submits print jobs.
frontend/src/utils/barcodeSettingsValida: Validates LabelSettings fields (barcode dimensions, label size, barcode positions, and spacing) and returns structured validation errors.
frontend/src/utils/icErrors.ts: Utility functions for detecting and formatting Internet Computer errors, specifically IC0508 canister-stopped errors, with user-friendly message extraction.
frontend/src/utils/labelSettingsErrors.t: Parses label settings update errors and maps IC canister, authorization, network, and other error types to user-friendly messages.
frontend/src/utils/labelSettingsImportEx: Provides BigInt-safe JSON serialization helpers and export/import functions for LabelSettings, with field migration/backfilling against defaults on import.
frontend/src/utils/labelTypes.ts: Defines built-in label type constants and utility functions to extract custom label types from prefix mappings and merge them with built-ins into sorted lists.
frontend/src/utils/scanPrintErrors.ts: Formats printer and backend submission errors into concise user-facing strings, and identifies non-blocking backend errors like canister-stopped conditions.
frontend/src/utils/serialNormalization.t: Exports a single normalizeSerial function that trims whitespace and strips trailing CR/LF/Tab characters from barcode-scanner input.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and hash-cleanup support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing two pending action requests: fix recurring production deployment errors in the Motoko backend and audit the frontend build configuration for production build failures.
